name: io.frontrun/frontrun
description: VC follow-signal intelligence for AI agents — track what 1,000+ venture investors follow on X and surface companies before their round. 29 read-only tools.

environmentVariables.name: FRONTRUN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional — the server runs OAuth device-flow setup if unset. Get a key at https://www.frontrun.vc (Pro, 7-day free trial).
